sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75665" key="o)sfrante/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀσφρ-αντέον</orth>, <sense id="n75665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must cause to smell at</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κασσίᾳ</foreign>, etc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:20:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.20.1</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
